variables.notes: Relative to the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket ('Selling, General & Admin', 'Salary and personnel expenses', 'Administrative Expenses', 'Other Expenses'), the D&A summary rows appear as separate same-level operating lines, so they are not already embedded in the selected rows and should be added separately. Summary rows are preferred over component depreciation/amortisation rows. Both summary labels are included because the statement appears to use one label in earlier periods and the other in later periods, without overlapping populated values that would imply double counting.
